hits.label: Ferromagnetism Near Room Temperature in the Cleavable van der Waals Crystal Fe5GeTe2
hits.summary: Official Xu Group publication (2019). Topics: vdw_magnetism.

hits.label: Observation of ferromagnetic phase in the second moiré band of twisted MoTe2
hits.summary: independent evidence for second-band ferromagnetism tuned by density and displacement field Curie temperature near `3.5 K` around filling `2.58` Use for: confirming second-band ferromagnetism is not a one-off result

hits.label: Theory of tunable flux lattices in the homobilayer moiré of twisted and uniformly strained transition metal dichalcogenides
hits.summary: twisted or strained TMD homobilayers can realize tunable moire flux lattices and engineer band topology through layer-pseudospin texture Use for: topology and gauge-field control in twisted TMD homobilayers before the experimental FQAH era

hits.label: Interplay between topology and correlations in the second moiré band of twisted bilayer MoTe2
hits.summary: the second moiré band hosts its own ferromagnetism, field-driven Chern behavior, and unusual magnetotransport around `2.2-2.7` holes per moiré cell, the paper reports large out-of-plane negative magnetoresistance and approximate `1/T` scaling Use for: higher-band anomalies

hits.label: Excitons in the fractional quantum Hall effect
hits.summary: even outside moiré TMDs, excitonic probes can resolve strongly correlated topological fluids Use for: broader context that optical access to fractional many-body physics is becoming a serious measurement mode, not a niche curiosity

hits.label: Layered Antiferromagnetism Induces Large Negative Magnetoresistance in the van der Waals Semiconductor CrSBr
hits.summary: Official Xu Group publication (2020). Topics: vdw_magnetism.

hits.label: Magnetic Order and Symmetry in the 2D Semiconductor CrSBr
hits.summary: Official Xu Group publication (2021). Venue hint: Nano Letters. Topics: vdw_magnetism.

hits.label: spin and valley are locked together in monolayer TMDs, which is why circular polarization can address valleys selectively in the first place
hits.summary: spin and valley are locked together in monolayer TMDs, which is why circular polarization can address valleys selectively in the first place Use for: baseline logic behind valley-selective optics, polarization-resolved PL, and field-induced valley splitting

hits.label: moire heterostructures can host strongly correlated electrons and hybrid excitons in the same device, with optical spectroscopy remaining sensitive to the electronic state
hits.summary: moire heterostructures can host strongly correlated electrons and hybrid excitons in the same device, with optical spectroscopy remaining sensitive to the electronic state Use for: the bridge between correlated electrons and excitonic readout in semiconductor moire platforms

hits.label: Dynamic Optical Tuning of Interlayer Interactions in the Transition Metal Dichalcogenides
hits.summary: Official Xu Group publication (2017). Venue hint: Nano Letters. Topics: other_quantum_materials.
